name: Badge
description: Small label for counts, statuses, or category tags.

api.name: Badge
api.description: Small label for counts, statuses, or category tags.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The badge's content. Ignored when IsDot is true.

parameters.name: IconContent
parameters.description: Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component.

parameters.name: Variant
parameters.description: Color variant. Default (primary) is applied when unset.

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Badge size — drives text size + padding. Md (default) reproduces the historical badge metrics. Use Sm for dense inline tags / counts and Lg for prominent status chips — avoids consumer-side !px-* / !h-* / !text-* overrides.

parameters.name: Pill
parameters.description: Pill shape instead of the default rounded-md — for count/quota chips. Theme-radius-aware: renders as a full pill at stock radii and squares off along with the rest of the UI in sharp themes (--radius: 0).

parameters.name: IsDot
parameters.description: Renders the badge as a small filled dot instead of a chip with text — for status indicators. When set, ChildContent/IconContent/ IsRemovable are not rendered.

parameters.name: Pulse
parameters.description: Adds a pulsing ping ring around a dot badge. Only has an effect when IsDot is also true.

parameters.name: IsRemovable
parameters.description: Renders a trailing remove (×) button that raises OnRemove when clicked.

parameters.name: OnRemove
parameters.description: Invoked when the remove button is clicked. Only rendered when IsRemovable is true.

parameters.name: Animated
parameters.description: When true, the badge plays a one-shot pop-in entrance animation (scale + opacity) on mount. Default is false.

parameters.name: Density
parameters.description: Per-badge density override. When null, inherits from any ancestor DensityScope; if neither is set, matches the historical Comfortable default. Adjusts padding (Spacious also adds a touch of vertical padding); text size + radius are unchanged. Has no effect on dot badges.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the badge's root element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the badge's root element.

events.name: OnRemove
events.description: Invoked when the remove button is clicked. Only rendered when IsRemovable is true.

examples.title: Sizes & Pill
examples.code:
<Badge Size="Badge.BadgeSize.Sm">Small</Badge>
<Badge Size="Badge.BadgeSize.Md">Medium</Badge>
<Badge Size="Badge.BadgeSize.Lg">Large</Badge>

<Badge Pill="true">99+</Badge>
<Badge Pill="true" Variant="Badge.BadgeVariant.Secondary">New</Badge>
<Badge Pill="true" Size="Badge.BadgeSize.Lg" Variant="Badge.BadgeVariant.Success">Online</Badge>

examples.title: Usage Examples
examples.code:
<Flex Align="center" Gap="2">
    <Lumeo.Text As="span" Size="sm" Weight="medium">Status</Lumeo.Text>
    <Badge Variant="Badge.BadgeVariant.Success">Active</Badge>
</Flex>
<Flex Align="center" Gap="2">
    <Lumeo.Text As="span" Size="sm" Weight="medium">Priority</Lumeo.Text>
    <Badge Variant="Badge.BadgeVariant.Destructive">High</Badge>
</Flex>

slots.name: ChildContent
slots.description: The badge's content. Ignored when IsDot is true.

slots.name: IconContent
slots.description: Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component.

mdSummary:
# Badge

Small label for counts, statuses, or category tags.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Data Display/Cards & Layout
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/badge

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Badge | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The badge's content. Ignored when IsDot is true. |
| Badge | IconContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the \<Icon\> component. |
| Badge | Variant | `BadgeVariant` | `BadgeVariant.Default` | Color variant. Default (primary) is applied when unset. |
| Badge | Size | `BadgeSize` | `BadgeSize.Md` | Badge size — drives text size + padding. Md (default) reproduces the historical badge metrics. Use Sm for dense inline tags / counts and Lg for prominent status chips — avoids consumer-side !px-* / !h-* / !text-* overrides. |
| Badge | Pill | `bool` | `false` | Pill shape instead of the default rounded-md — for count/quota chips. Theme-radius-aware: renders as a full pill at stock radii and squares off along with the rest of the UI in sharp themes (--radius: 0). |
| Badge | IsDot | `bool` | `false` | Renders the badge as a small filled dot instead of a chip with text — for status indicators. When set, ChildContent/IconContent/ IsRemovable are not rendered. |
| Badge | Pulse | `bool` | `false` | Adds a pulsing ping ring around a dot badge. Only has an effect when IsDot is also true. |
| Badge | IsRemovable | `bool` | `false` | Renders a trailing remove (×) button that raises OnRemove when clicked. |
| Badge | OnRemove | `EventCallback` | `` | Invoked when the remove button is clicked. Only rendered when IsRemovable is true. |
| Badge | Animated | `bool` | `false` | When true, the badge plays a one-shot pop-in entrance animation (scale + opacity) on mount. Default is false. |
| Badge | Density | `Density?` | `` | Per-badge density override. When null, inherits from any ancestor DensityScope; if neither is set, matches the historical Comfortable default. Adjusts padding (Spacious also adds a touch of vertical padding); text size + radius are unchanged. Has no effect on dot badges. |
| Badge | InheritedDensity | `Density?` | `` |  |
| Badge | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the badge's root element. |
| Badge | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the badge's root element. |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Badge) — The badge's content. Ignored when IsDot is true.
- `IconContent` (Badge) — Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the \<Icon\> component.

## Events
- `OnRemove` (`EventCallback`) — Invoked when the remove button is clicked. Only rendered when IsRemovable is true.

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- `InheritedDensity` (`Density?`)

## Services it injects
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Badge />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-border`, `--color-destructive`, `--color-destructive-foreground`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-primary-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--color-secondary`, `--color-secondary-foreground`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Badge/Badge.razor`
